column8: Rocket was the first train Stephenson built.
column9: Robert's grandfather worked with steam-powered machinery.
column10: George was the first member of his family to attend school.
column11: George was employed by a mining company in 1819.
column12: There were technical problems with the first passenger train.
column13: Locomotion Number I was the fastest train in the world at that time.
column14: Rocket did not finish the competition in 1829.
column15: A politician who was watching Rocket in 1830 died.
